title: Biofuels Production Managers
description: Manage biofuels production and plant operations. Collect and process information on plant production and performance, diagnose problems, and design corrective procedures.

tasks.text: Supervise production employees in the manufacturing of biofuels, such as biodiesel or ethanol.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage operations at biofuels power generation facilities, including production, shipping, maintenance, or quality assurance activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide direction to employees to ensure compliance with biofuels plant safety, environmental, or operational standards and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with technical and supervisory personnel to report or resolve conditions affecting biofuels plant safety, operational efficiency, and product quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review logs, datasheets, or reports to ensure adequate production levels or to identify abnormalities with biofuels production equipment or processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor meters, flow gauges, or other real-time data to ensure proper operation of biofuels production equipment, implementing corrective measures as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Adjust temperature, pressure, vacuum, level, flow rate, or transfer of biofuels to maintain processes at required levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide training to subordinate or new employees to improve biofuels plant safety or increase the production of biofuels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Shut down and restart biofuels plant or equipment in emergency situations or for equipment maintenance, repairs, or replacements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor transportation and storage of flammable or other potentially dangerous feedstocks or products to ensure adherence to safety guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Draw samples of biofuels products or secondary by-products for quality control testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Approve proposals for the acquisition, replacement, or repair of biofuels processing equipment or the implementation of new production processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and manage biofuels plant or unit budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct cost, material, and efficiency studies for biofuels production plants or operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
